channel.title: MiSTer FPGA Core & Arcade Tracker: New cores & games
channel.description: Cores and arcade games newly added to the public MiSTer databases. See feed.xml for updates too.

item.title: [New] Apple Lisa (Computer core)
item.description:
1983 / Apple

New in the public MiSTer databases on 2026-07-13 (source: distribution_mister).

Commit history

item.title: [New] Apple IIGS (Computer core)
item.description:
